more_than_2yrs.horizon_definition: Each bar is washes in a single 6-month window only (no running cumulative). >2y panel: months 25–30, 31–36, 37–42, 43–48 (labeled by window end 30/36/42/48).

brand_new_site_continuation.narrative: Bars are independent 6-month wash totals per period. Optional running_total_through_operational_month sums those periods in calendar order through month 48.

calendar_year_washes.definition: Each value is the sum of forecast monthly washes in that operational year after open (year 1 = months 1–12, year 2 = 13–24, year 3 = 25–36, year 4 = 37–48).
